# VER-QUIC-CRT-0033 - QUIC qlog adapter package boundary verification

## Scope

Verify that the sibling adapter maps transport diagnostics into Incursa.Qlog.Quic events and keeps file and serializer ownership outside Incursa.Quic.

## Requirements Verified

- REQ-QUIC-CRT-0136

## Verification Method

Focused mapping tests and dependency inspection.

## Preconditions

- The qlog-dotnet sibling repository is available at C:\src\incursa\qlog-dotnet.
- The core diagnostics slice is already traced under REQ-QUIC-CRT-0134 and REQ-QUIC-CRT-0135.

## Procedure or Approach

- Verify structured diagnostics map to qlog lifecycle, negotiation, packet activity, stream movement, and recovery events.
- Confirm schema registration occurs at the adapter boundary rather than in Incursa.Quic.
- Inspect package references to confirm `Incursa.Quic.Qlog` depends on `Incursa.Quic`, `Incursa.Qlog`, and `Incursa.Qlog.Quic` only in the forward direction.
- Confirm the transport core remains free of qlog builders, serializer packages, and file paths.

## Expected Result

The sibling adapter translates structured transport diagnostics into `Incursa.Qlog.Quic` events and keeps qlog trace and output ownership outside the transport core.
